claim: Behavior rule: In similar future work, apply this decision: Rechecked GitHub release upload after the user noted GitHub updates had worked previously. Found the earlier miss: git credential fill did not expose credentials, but git credential-manager get did return the GitHub token for the logged-in clockmansy account. Used that token only in-process to run npm run release:win -- -Tag v0.1.3 -ReplaceAsset. Created the GitHub release, uploaded DinoBrainSetup.zip and DinoBrainSetup.zip.sha256, then verified by downloading the private asset through the GitHub asset API and comparing SHA256 hashes.
